meta.description: Aahaar starter nutrition seed — common Indian foods with per-100g macros and household portion mappings.
meta.count_note: 106 foods incl. common composite dishes. Expand toward ~250 + validate vs IFCT 2017 before launch.
meta.accuracy_disclaimer: Values are APPROXIMATE starter figures for building/testing. Validate against IFCT 2017 (National Institute of Nutrition) and Open Food Facts before public launch. Cooked-dish values assume typical home preparation and vary widely with oil/ghee.

units.per_100g: calories in kcal; protein/carbs/fat/fiber in grams, per 100g (or per 100ml for liquids)
units.portions: grams (or ml) that one of the named household unit weighs for this food
